contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: StarCi is built by one person — your question reaches the person who makes it. Pick the fastest route below, or send a message.
contact.responseTime: We usually reply within 24 hours (support hours Mon–Fri, 9:00–18:00).

form.title: Send a message
form.name: Full name
form.successBody: Thanks. We'll get back to you by email as soon as we can.
form.errorTitle: Couldn't send your message. Please try again.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.q1: How soon will I get a reply?
faq.a1: Usually within 24 hours, during support hours Mon–Fri 9:00–18:00.
faq.q2: I can't log in or forgot my password?
faq.a2: Use "Forgot password" on the sign-in screen to reset it. If you're still stuck, send the form with your account email.
faq.a3: Send the form with the "Course / account support" reason and your transaction id, and we'll look into it.
faq.q4: Want to partner or hire StarCi learners?
faq.a4: Pick the "Partnership / hiring" reason when sending the form, or message the founder directly on LinkedIn.
faq.q5: Questions about the courses, or whether StarCi is right for you?
faq.a5: See the FAQ on the home page — it covers the roadmap, who it's for, and how learning works in detail.
faq.landingLink: See course FAQ on the home page

home.intro: IT courses are everywhere online, but content that is concise and focuses on practical thinking is rare.
home.intro2: StarCi Academy was founded to change that.
home.intro3: We focus on building programming thinking - from Fullstack, DevOps, Security to Solution Architect - with a clear and practical roadmap.

diff.title: What makes StarCi Academy different?
diff.des1: StarCi Academy focuses on the essence of the IT industry. We don't just teach knowledge, but also train standard programming thinking and system design skills - core competencies that help you develop sustainably in the AI era.
diff.des3: Technology changes constantly and knowledge is everywhere. We focus on teaching the fundamentals, keywords, and thinking skills so that after the course, you can research, read docs, and expand on any stack you want.
diff.des5: StarCi Academy operates on a lean model, eliminating unnecessary costs to keep tuition affordable. Our goal is to create a high-quality learning environment that anyone serious about the profession can join.
diff.des6: We teach you to build truly valuable projects and provide long-term support throughout your career development.

hero.headline:
Break out of the CRUD loop.

Learn to design systems like a Solution Architect.
hero.subline: StarCi is not a generic fullstack bootcamp. It is where you train architectural thinking — what AI has not replaced, and what decides whether you are a "code monkey" or a system designer.
